system.description:
### Tier 2 Solo An elder warlord possessing immense physical strength and biotics, capable of taking on whole squads alone. Motives & Tactics: Charge, barrier regeneration, blast, rage

#### Features Relentless (2): The Banshee can be spotlighted up to 2 times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

Biotic Charge - Action: Mark a Stress to charge through a group within Close range and make an attack against all targets in the Battlemaster’s path. Targets the Battlemaster succeeds against take 2d6+8 physical damage and are knocked back to Very Far range. If a target is knocked into a solid object or another creature, they take an extra 1d6 damage (combine their damage).

Barrier - Reaction: When the Battlemaster would take damage, spend 1 Stress to roll 1d12. Reduce the damage by the result.

Nova - Action: Spend 2 Fear. The Battlemaster expends their Biotic Barrier in an explosion. All targets within Close range take 4d8 ene damage. The Battlemaster can't use the Barrier reaction anymore.

}}
